name: Aditya Bikram
profile_summary: Data scientist with experience in Python, SQL, PySpark, MLOps, and product analytics. Worked on model deployment, dashboards, and business impact analytics.

experience.title: Specialist - Quantitative Analysis & Data Science
experience.description: Built Python-based analytics workflows, deployed predictive models, created Power BI dashboards, and automated reporting. Worked with product stakeholders, performed hypothesis testing, root cause analysis, and improved benchmark delivery speed by 70%. Implemented model tracking and scalable data pipelines.

experience.title: Data Scientist / ML Engineer
experience.description: Developed PySpark ETL pipelines on AWS, optimized distributed jobs, built XGBoost models, and designed reusable feature engineering pipelines. Dockerized services and contributed to model deployment workflows with Kubernetes.

certifications: IIT Madras Diploma in Data Science
